title: The Truth Feels Better
lesson: Telling the truth after a mistake mends things and makes you feel lighter inside.
prompts: Place the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image into a cozy living room in the afternoon, bouncing a red ball near a wooden shelf that holds a blue flower vase. Medium shot at eye level, the person facing the camera with their face fully visible and a playful expression. Warm indoor light, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

Transform the scene: the blue flower vase has just fallen from the shelf and shattered on the wooden floor, scattered ceramic pieces and a little spilled water. The {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image stands facing the camera with both hands over their mouth and a shocked expression, face clearly visible. Same cozy living room, warm light, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

The {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image stands alone beside the broken blue vase pieces, looking down worriedly but with the head turned toward the camera so the face stays clearly visible. A doorway in the background. Quiet afternoon light, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

A scene in the same living room. The {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image stands on the far left, facing the camera with an honest, slightly nervous expression and the face fully visible, one hand pointing toward the broken vase on the floor. On the right, {GENDER_F_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} listens with a calm, understanding look. Eye-level medium-wide shot, warm light, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

The {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image is on the far left, kneeling to pick up the ceramic pieces but with the head turned toward the camera so the face stays clearly visible, with a softer expression. {GENDER_F_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} kneels to the right, helping gather the pieces and smiling gently. Same living room, warm reassuring light, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

The {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image stands on the far left, facing the camera with a relieved, happy smile and the face fully visible. On the right, {GENDER_F_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} rests a hand warmly on their shoulder. A fresh flower sits in a new cup on the shelf behind them. Warm golden light, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.
